partnership_models.description: Company funds a defined UNC research project with deliverables and IP terms.
UNC licenses a patent or technology to the company.
Company accesses a named UNC dataset under a formal agreement.
Company hosts a UNC student in a structured training program.
Company conducts a trial or study through UNC Health and NC TraCS.
